form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 29 over 350m at this track behind Full Twist beaten 2.25 lengths (20.32). Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 29 over 350m at this track behind Full Twist beaten 2.25 lengths (20.32). Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (20.43) at this track over 350m. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish second (20.43) at this track over 350m. Found one better last time. Well placed and worth following up.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 3.5 lengths at this track (20.02) beating Arctic Bell in a Grade 5 on February 22. Risky starter, leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 350m at this track beaten one length (20.13) behind Fighting Fair in a Mix on April 12. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 350m at this track beaten one length (20.13) behind Fighting Fair in a Mix on April 12. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Returns from a spell and worth noting was a winner when last resuming, scoring over 350m at this track. Capable of playing a role in the finish.

form.formComment: Tends to be fast away. Last start finished sixth over 350m at this track, beaten 8 lengths (20.61) behind Fighting Fair in a Mix on April 12. Likely to find this a bit tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on numerous occasions in restricted racing room leaving the first turn.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (22.05) in a GR 5 at this track five months ago. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign with a eighth (22.05) in a GR 5 at this track five months ago. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Finished off last campaign when third (20.52) over 350m at this track before a break of ten weeks. Has ability and worth including while fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished off last campaign when third (20.52) over 350m at this track before a break of ten weeks. Has ability and worth including while fresh.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 8 length sixth over 350m at this track. Can't recommend him in this.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Casino to win by 0.8 lengths in 17.20, beating Dusty Diva. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 300m at Casino behind Chip And Gravy beaten 8 lengths (17.82). Others have better credentials.
